title: Anticoagulation perioperative documentation

red_flags.text: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.
red_flags.rationale: Supports anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context for perioperative anticoagulation documentation; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

exact_section.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk

red_flags.text: Supports documented high-risk review and local policies for tests, blood, fasting, medicines, escalation, referral, and pregnancy without generating an action.
red_flags.rationale: Supports local policies for medicines, testing, escalation and referral for perioperative anticoagulation documentation; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documented high-risk review and local policies for tests, blood, fasting, medicines, escalation, referral, and pregnancy without generating an action.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Medicine, indication, dose, renal function, last dose, procedure bleeding risk, thrombosis risk, laboratory results, hold or restart timing, bridging and ownership remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for perioperative anticoagulation documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
